description: Filter Attacks Components - UI components for building complex attack filter queries with attribute-operator-value conditions and AND/OR logic

userStories.title: Create TypeScript types and interfaces for filter components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need type definitions for filter components to ensure type safety.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/ui/src/filter/types.ts file
Define FilterChipData interface with id, variant, attribute, operator, value, error fields
Define FilterChipVariant type: 'chip' | 'and' | 'or' | '(' | ')'
Define FieldMetadata interface matching backend structure (name, label, type, description, operators, default)
Define ExprNode, Condition, and Group types for expression tree
Define operator mapping constants (OPERATOR_LABELS, OPERATORS_BY_TYPE)
Export all types from types.ts
Typecheck passes
